item.title: Business Card Designing Program [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Business Card Designing Program [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: invitecardsdesigne1
item.itunes:summary:
Business Card Designing Program
(Office Apps)
Company presents Business Card Designing Program for those designers who want to create colorful business visiting cards for professional purposes in easiest manner. Invitation card designing utility consists of interactive graphical user interface helpful in designing business cards within just fraction of seconds. Card designing utility consists of predefined templates used to create visiting cards in fast manner.
[read more]

Card designing utility consists of predefined templates used to create visiting cards in fast manner.

Company presents Business Card Designing Program for those designers who want to create colorful business visiting cards for professional purposes in easiest manner. Invitation card designing utility consists of interactive graphical user interface helpful in designing business cards within just fraction of seconds. Card designing utility consists of predefined templates used to create visiting cards in fast manner.

item.title: Greeting Cards Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Greeting Cards Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: businesscard
item.itunes:summary:
Greeting Cards Software
(Office Apps)
Worried about how to create attractive folded greeting for your friends and family members? Visit company www.businesscardmakersoftware.com website which offers Greeting Cards Software for making distinct greeting cards using objects including picture, pencil, arc, triangle, star, line, ellipse etc. Successful design greeting cards application makes versatile greetings of types including ellipse, rounded, rectangular, CD/DVD shapes and operates in compatible manner with Windows 11, 10, 8 etc.

[read more]

item.title: anymeal [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: anymeal [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: wedesoft
item.itunes:summary:
anymeal
(Utilities)
AnyMeal is a free recipe database software developed using SQLite3 and Qt6. It can manage a cookbook with more than 250,000 recipes, thereby allowing to import, export, search, display, edit, and print them. AnyMeal is available for GNU/Linux and Microsoft Windows.

[read more]

anymeal

[read more]

anymeal

ID Badges Designing Software

item.title: Business ID Card Design [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Business ID Card Design [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: businesscard
item.itunes:summary:
Business ID Card Design
(Office Apps)
Download Business ID Card Design Software from www.businesscardmakersoftware.com to make various types of ID cards using sequential, random and constant generating series value. ID Creator Program uses in-built advanced printing setting for designing printable IDs cards in linear/2D barcode font. Innovative Business ID Card Design Software creates multiple ID cards and saves into any major image file format on PC which can be user latter whenever required.

[read more]

item.title: Wedding Invitation Cards Designing [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Wedding Invitation Cards Designing [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: invitecardsdesigne1
item.itunes:summary:
Wedding Invitation Cards Designing
(Office Apps)
Technically advance invitation cards maker utility offers advance color and background settings including solid color, gradient, image and font option to generate best quality marriage cards in bulk numbers. Extraordinary Wedding Invitation Cards Designing tool offers facility to modify existing or create new cards using text, clip Art, Word Art and other graphical objects.
